body_html:
Cool Down Fast. Reset in Minutes.

A soft gel cooling cap that wraps the forehead, temples, eyes, and head with soothing cold relief. Keep it chilled, pull it on in seconds, and take 10–20 minutes to cool down, decompress, and block out the world.

  • Fast cooling relief for forehead, temples, eyes, and head
  • Light-blocking fit for darker, calmer rest time
  • Reusable and non-electric with no setup, cables, or charging

Quick use: Chill for 10+ minutes. Wear for 10–20 minutes. Reuse anytime.

Why people buy it

  • Cooling comfort on demand when your head feels hot, tense, or overstimulated
  • A darker, calmer reset that can cover the eyes and help create a quieter rest moment
  • Effortless daily use with a reusable design that stays ready in the fridge or freezer

Best times to use it

  • After long laptop or phone sessions
  • On hot afternoons and overheated evenings
  • After stressful days or intense workouts
  • Before bed as part of a wind-down routine
  • Any time you want 10–20 minutes of quiet, cooling relief

How it works

  1. Chill it in the fridge or freezer for at least 10 minutes.
  2. Pull it on over the forehead, temples, eyes, and head as desired.
  3. Relax for 10–20 minutes and let the cooling compression help you reset.

Why it’s easier than ordinary cold packs

  • Wraparound fit instead of balancing a loose pack
  • Hands-free comfort while resting
  • No batteries or charging required
  • Reusable whenever you need it
  • Easy to store and quick to grab

FAQs

How cold should it be before use?
For best results, place it in the fridge or freezer for at least 10 minutes. Adjust the chill time based on your preferred intensity.

How long should I wear it?
It works best in short 10–20 minute sessions.

What areas does it cover?
Depending on how you wear it, it can cover the forehead, temples, eyes, and surrounding head area.

Does it block light?
Yes. The pull-down fit can help create a darker environment for rest and decompression.

Can I use it warm too?
Yes. It can also be used as a warm compress when heated according to safe instructions.

Is it reusable?
Yes. It is designed for repeated daily use.

Does it need batteries or charging?
No. It is completely non-electric.

What if it is not right for me?
You are covered by our 30-day return policy. If you need help, contact support and we will guide you through the next steps.

Shipping & purchase confidence

  • 30-day returns
  • Order tracking sent after shipment
  • Processing: 1–3 business days
  • Typical delivery: 6–12 business days depending on destination
  • Secure checkout

Keep one chilled and ready whenever you need a quick reset.
